# Bloomme — Complete AI Reference

> Bloomme is India's first subscription-based daily puja flower delivery service. We deliver fresh, hand-picked flowers and spiritual essentials to devotees' doorsteps every morning between 5:30–7:30 AM, before their daily prayers. Based in Faridabad, Haryana.

## What is Bloomme?
Bloomme is a D2C (direct-to-consumer) subscription service that solves a daily problem for Hindu devotees: getting fresh puja flowers every morning without visiting a market. Traditional local vendors are unreliable, deliver stale flowers, and often skip deliveries. Bloomme replaces this with a subscription model that guarantees fresh, hygienic, beautifully packed flowers at the doorstep before sunrise.

## Subscription Plans

### Traditional Plan — ₹59/day
- Loose marigolds and jasmine (staple puja flowers)
- Eco-friendly paper packaging
- Daily freshness guarantee
- Ideal for: simple daily puja, solo devotees, seniors

### Divine Plan — ₹89/day
- Premium seasonal flower mix (3–4 varieties rotated weekly)
- Incense sticks included weekly
- Festival upgrades on major Hindu holidays
- Premium box packaging
- Ideal for: families, regular puja rituals, households that want variety

### Celestial Plan — ₹179/day
- Exotic floral arrangements (premium flower varieties, ~200g)
- Full ritual essentials box (dhoop, diya, agarbatti, cotton batti)
- Concierge ritual support
- High-quality premium packaging
- Ideal for: complete puja setup, festival households, gifting

## Key Features
- **Delivery time:** 5:30 AM – 7:30 AM daily (before morning prayers)
- **Freshness:** Flowers sourced same morning, picked and packed day-of
- **Packaging:** Eco-friendly banana leaf and paper, minimal plastic
- **Pause anytime:** Skip deliveries for travel, illness, or any reason
- **Custom schedule:** Choose delivery days (daily, weekdays, weekends, custom)
- **No daily ordering:** Subscribe once, receive automatically
- **Damage guarantee:** Replacement delivery or account credit if flowers arrive damaged

## Add-On Products
Available for one-time or recurring orders (24-hour advance order required):
- Flower malas (hand-tied garlands) — ₹299
- Rose petals in brass bowl — ₹499
- Sacred lotus flowers — ₹399
- Agarbatti pack of 3 — ₹349
- Cotton batti (wicks) — ₹449
- Diya sets — ₹549

## Service Area
- Currently serving: Faridabad, Haryana — NIT areas (sectors 15, Sainik Colony, Greenfield)
- Expanding to: more Faridabad sectors, then NCR

## Why Bloomme vs Local Vendor
| Factor | Local Vendor | Bloomme |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| Reliability | Often skips | Guaranteed |
| Freshness | Day-old flowers common | Same-morning sourcing |
| Variety | Same every day | Rotated weekly |
| Hygiene | Unpackaged | Eco-packaged |
| Convenience | Must be home to receive | Leave at door |
| Flexibility | Cannot pause | Pause anytime |
| Price | ~₹30–40 (inconsistent) | ₹59–₹179 (predictable) |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What time are flowers delivered?**
Between 5:30 AM and 7:30 AM every day, ensuring they are available before morning prayers.

**Can I pause my subscription?**
Yes. Pause anytime for travel or personal reasons, resume with no penalty.

**What if flowers are damaged?**
Contact support. We arrange a replacement or credit your account.

**Which areas are served?**
Currently NIT areas of Faridabad, Haryana. Expanding soon.

**How fresh are the flowers?**
Sourced every morning, sorted, packed, and delivered the same day.

**Can I customize flower type?**
Limited customization available with 24-hour advance request.

**Is packaging eco-friendly?**
Yes — banana leaf and paper packaging, minimal plastic.
